data.content: Plan complete for auto-resolving parent knots when children reach terminal state. Key decisions: (1) Add targeted ancestor resolution function in state_hierarchy.rs rather than reusing global scan, (2) Hook into set_state_with_actor_and_options and update_knot_with_options after terminal transitions, (3) Loop upward through ancestor chain for multi-level cascades, (4) Need to handle lock reacquisition since reconcile_terminal_parent_state acquires its own locks. Test strategy covers unit, integration, and E2E levels with topology edge cases.
